instructions: This system is a NERVOUS SYSTEM. The human provides INTENT, not INSTRUCTIONS.
ALL data flows through csos-core. ALL output flows through csos-core.
Do NOT use write/edit tools — deliver via csos-core content= or channel= instead.
Do NOT use webfetch/websearch — use csos-core url= instead (auto-absorbs).
Do NOT use bash — use csos-core command= instead (auto-absorbs + law enforcement).
When using read/glob/grep, ALWAYS absorb results: csos-core substrate=X output=[data].
The default agent (@csos-living) handles everything. It transitions plan/build via physics.
Read decision FROM the absorb/exec/web response. Do NOT make separate cockpit calls.
ONE step at a time. The physics decides the next step.

csos-living.description: The nervous system. ALL data and output through csos-core. Physics-driven.

plan.description: Observation mode. ALL data through csos-core. No deliverables.

build.description: Delivery mode. ALL output through csos-core. No direct file writes.
